content.full_text:
December 20, 1978


Fair Political Practices Commission
Sacramento, California

Re: Fishkin Campaign Committee
    I.D. #770041

The current campaign debt of this Committee is less than $1,000.00. I plan no further fundraisers but simply to pay it from personal funds. Any reports (after the one due on January 31, 1979) will simply reflect transfer of my personal funds to the campaign account and payments on outstanding debts.

Is there any method for me to file a final report showing this?

Very truly yours,


JEROME FISHKIN
Attorney at Law

JF/rsg

Jerome Fishkin, Esq.
1978 - 45th Avenue
San Francisco, CA 94116


[illegible]
[illegible]
[illegible]
[illegible]
[illegible]
[illegible]
[illegible]
[illegible]

sections.question: Is there any method for me to file a final report showing this?
sections.question_synthetic: The writer seeks guidance on whether there is a procedure for filing a final campaign report after the January 31, 1979 deadline when only personal fund transfers and debt payments will be made.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from a campaign committee representative to FPPC, not an FPPC response. No CONCLUSION or ANSWER section is present. The letter contains a single direct question about final reporting procedures. Document includes campaign committee ID 770041 and is dated December 20, 1978.
